items.ja: 赤のべっぴん薬膳カリー
items.en: Red Beppin medicinal curry (20+ spices, 8 wine-simmered vegetables + chicken; thin roux-free wheat-free broth; spice levels 1–6)
items.note: Signature dish. Shop states it is made without wheat flour. Lunch set adds rice, potato salad, onion pickles & coffee — confirm no wheat-based sauce is used and skip the mayo-based potato salad if unverified.

items.ja: 黒のべっぴんカシミールカリー
items.en: Black Beppin Kashmir curry (extra-spicy version of the wheat-free spice curry)
items.note: Same flour-free spice base as the red curry, hotter. Confirm seasoning contains no wheat soy/Worcestershire.
Built on the shop's wheat-free spice broth. Shellfish. Confirm no wheat-based stock/sauce added.

items.ja: 牛すじカシミールカリー (赤ワイン煮込み)
items.en: Beef-tendon Kashmir curry, simmered in red wine
items.note: Red-wine-braised beef tendon on the flour-free spice base. Wine is generally GF, but confirm no wheat-thickened braising liquid or soy is used.
Signature 100% rice-flour loaf.
Sliced version.

items.ja: ビオブレッドショコラ
items.note: Chocolate loaf.

items.ja: ビオブレッドブルーベリー
items.note: Blueberry loaf.
Soy-based loaf; typically dairy/egg-free — confirm in-store.
Brown-rice-flour mountain loaf.
Contains butter — not vegan.

items.note: Contains butter — not vegan.
Small round rolls.

Bean bread; typically plant-based — confirm.

Walnut and raisin bread.

items.ja: プティブールトマトバジルミニ
items.note: Tomato-basil mini rolls; listed on site.
Rice-flour bread, crisp outside / chewy inside; confirm spreads.
Rice-flour version of Morioka reimen; confirm broth/tare soy sauce is wheat-free.
With Iwate Iwaizumi yogurt + additive-free gluten-free rice-flour granola; NOT vegan (yogurt). Takeout OK.

items.ja: ノンオイルサラダチキンのサラダ
items.note: Confirm dressing — soy sauce may contain wheat.

items.ja: 醤油麹のやわらか焼き鳥丼
items.note: Uses 醤油麹 (soy-sauce koji) — contains wheat unless tamari. Not safe for celiac unless confirmed.
Hamburg patty (likely breadcrumbs) + gravy — wheat risk; avoid.
Roux typically contains wheat flour — avoid.
Hamburg usually made with wheat breadcrumbs — avoid unless confirmed 米粉.
Stew roux typically contains wheat — avoid.
Beef may be GF but confirm sauce (soy) is wheat-free.
Confirm seasonings — soboro/tare often use wheat soy sauce.
Freshly baked, chewy; seasonal specials reservation-only (~¥2,200–2,960). Served with butter/ice cream — not vegan.
Rice-flour waffles with drink.
Rice-flour sponge roll.

items.ja: 黒ごまくるみ米粉パンケーキ
items.note: Rice-flour pancake variant.
Signature; 米粉ベース with cashew butter-cream; reuses juice-shop pulp. Vegan & gluten-free.
Part of the all-vegan, all-gluten-free baked-goods lineup (rice-flour based).
Vegan & gluten-free焼き菓子.

items.ja: ウィークエンド（シトロンケーキ）
items.note: Seasonal vegan & gluten-free baked good.

items.ja: カフェラテ（オーツ／アーモンド／ソイ／ピスタチオミルク）
items.en: Café latte (oat / almond / soy / pistachio milk)
items.note: Plant milk only, no dairy, no substitution upcharge.

items.ja: ハンドドリップコーヒー
items.note: Light-roast single-origin specialty coffee, naturally gluten-free.
Naturally gluten-free.
House-made, plant-based, gluten-free.

items.ja: スペシャルティコーヒー豆（100g、例：コロンビア／エチオピア）
items.en: Specialty coffee beans (100g retail, e.g. Colombia / Ethiopia)
items.note: Retail beans; roasted on-site. Colombia ~¥1,500, Ethiopia ~¥800 per bag depending on origin.
Flour-free spice sauce over plain rice. Ask for no fukujinzuke pickle and skip the complimentary potage; no dedicated allergen handling. Large sauce (ソース大) ¥1,600.
Flour-free spice sauce over plain rice; no fukujinzuke, skip potage. Large sauce ¥1,800.
Flour-free spice sauce over plain rice; shellfish. No fukujinzuke, skip potage. Large sauce ¥1,900.
Flour-free spice sauce over plain rice; no fukujinzuke, skip potage. Large sauce ¥2,000.
Flour-free spice sauce over plain rice; no fukujinzuke, skip potage. Large sauce ¥2,400.

Limited to ~15/day. Hayashi sauce is NOT described as flour-free (demi-glace-style sauces normally contain wheat) — treat as not GF and ask before ordering; the flour-free claim applies to the Sumatra curry, not this. Large sauce ¥2,000.
Oct–early May only, tiny daily quantity. Baking preparation unverified for gluten — ask before ordering.

items.en: Eterno (small) — moist rice-flour baumkuchen, fresh cream, smooth melt
items.note: Signature; allergens 卵・米粉・乳 (egg, rice flour, milk). 100% rice flour, gluten-free.

Allergens 卵・米粉・乳・アーモンド.

items.note: In-store only; Eterno ~¥540 / Moncone ~¥648. Allergens 卵・米粉・乳.
Irregular stock; rice-flour, gluten-free.
Salt + grilled mackerel over rice — likely wheat-free; confirm no soy-sauce seasoning. Not vegan (fish).
Salted salmon over rice — likely wheat-free; confirm salt-only cure, no soy. Not vegan (fish).

items.ja: 黒ゴマきなこおにぎり
items.note: Vegan; kinako (roasted soybean flour) and black sesame are naturally gluten-free, but confirm no wheat added and no shared-surface contact.
Signature vegan onigiri; tofu 'cheese' may be miso/koji-marinated — confirm no barley miso / wheat before treating as GF.
Vegan; confirm seasoning (soy sauce risk) before treating as GF.
Vegan but kombu tsukudani is simmered in soy sauce — wheat risk; not GF unless tamari confirmed.
Not vegan (bonito); okaka usually seasoned with soy sauce — wheat risk.
Fish; soy-simmered — not vegan, wheat risk.

items.ja: アサリの佃煮おにぎり
items.note: Shellfish tsukudani simmered in soy sauce — not vegan, wheat risk.

items.note: Fish simmered in soy sauce — not vegan, wheat risk.

items.ja: 生たらこだらけおにぎり

Meat; miso may be barley-based — not vegan, wheat risk.

items.en: Vegan plate (vegan main + veg deli + onigiri + miso soup)
items.note: Fully vegan set; miso soup may use barley miso and deli seasoning may include soy — confirm for GF.

items.en: Vegetable deli plate (veg deli + 1 onigiri + soup)
items.note: Vegan when a vegan onigiri is chosen; deli/soup seasoning is a soy/wheat risk for GF.

items.en: Balance plate (choose meat/fish/vegan main + veg deli + onigiri + soup)
items.note: Vegan only if the vegan main + vegan onigiri are chosen; default includes meat/fish. Soup/seasoning wheat risk for GF.
Weekend-only set; vegan option selectable. Confirm components for GF/vegan.

items.ja: ヴィーガンスノーボール
items.note: Vegan but snowball cookies are typically wheat-flour based — NOT gluten-free. Often sells out.
Black coffee is GF and vegan; specify no dairy milk.
Vegan; included with the weekend plate. Confirm blend contains no barley (mugicha) for GF.

items.en: Cold 100% buckwheat soba with dipping tsuyu (250g)
items.note: Noodle is 100% buckwheat (wheat-free), but the dipping tsuyu is wheat soy sauce — negotiate no-tsuyu / bring tamari; shared fryer airborne flour in shop.
100% buckwheat noodle, but the hot broth uses wheat soy sauce + bonito dashi — not GF or vegan as served.

items.en: Cold soba with nori and dipping tsuyu
items.note: Same wheat-free noodle; standard wheat-soy tsuyu — negotiate no-tsuyu / bring tamari.
Agedama tempura bits are fried wheat batter — contains wheat; avoid.
Tempura is wheat-battered and fried on-site — not GF; represents the shared-fryer flour risk.

items.en: Soba topped with vegetable kakiage fritter
items.note: Kakiage is wheat-battered and deep-fried — contains wheat.
Seasoned rice bowl — seasoning likely contains soy sauce; confirm before eating, do not assume GF.

items.en: Add-on kakiage tempura rice bowl set
items.note: Fried wheat kakiage over rice with sauce — not GF.
Standard Japanese curry roux contains wheat flour — not GF.
Portion upgrade on any soba; same wheat-tsuyu caveat applies.
Barley beer — contains gluten (present on premises).
